array.string:
cd ~/dotfiles before=$(git rev-parse HEAD) git pull --ff-only 2>&1 after=$(git rev-parse HEAD) if [[ "$before" != "$after" ]]; then echo "dotfiles updated — relinking and updating vim plugins..." ~/dotfiles/update.sh 2>&1 fi
cd ~/dev/reminders-cli before=$(git rev-parse HEAD) git pull --ff-only 2>&1 after=$(git rev-parse HEAD) if [[ "$before" != "$after" ]]; then echo "reminders-cli updated — rebuilding..." ~/dev/reminders-cli/reminders setup 2>&1 fi
